unit_classification_authority.official_framework: IB Diploma Programme Mathematics: analysis and approaches guide, first assessment 2021
unit_classification_authority.policy: IB Math AA classification uses the official syllabus topic sequence and SL/HL scope. Third-party topic maps and filename labels can suggest review candidates only.

classification_contract.rule: Assign each item to the latest official Math AA topic required by the solution path, with all earlier topics available.
classification_contract.sl_hl_rule: HL-only content is never eligible for an SL subject or SL paper-practice flow.
classification_contract.paper_rule: Paper metadata is not a topic classification substitute. Paper, level, marks, and calculator status must be validated independently.
